name: The Divot
about: The Divot is a year-round golf simulator facility with 4 bays in Littleton, CO. It operates as a publicly accessible indoor venue during the off-season (November-March) and as a member-only club from April through October. The facility is equipped with Uneekor and GSPro technology, offering extensive data tracking and access to world-renowned virtual courses. Private and group instruction is available from four certified PGA professionals, with lessons held indoors at The Divot and outdoors at The Links Golf Course in-season. The venue operates on a mixed pricing model, including hourly rentals and various membership options ranging from punch passes to unlimited 24/7 access, with blackout periods during peak times.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor Swing Optix technology provides detailed swing data
24/7 unlimited access with flexible membership options
Access to legendary courses like Augusta National and Pebble Beach
BYOB food policy enhances the social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons may bring their own food. Free water, coffee, and tea are provided.
No alcohol is allowed on the premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium video cameras with data points including swing path, club face, and swing speed.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: You may bring your own food and non-alcoholic beverages. Free water, coffee, and tea are also provided.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, it takes about one hour for one player to play 18 holes or two hours for two players to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Divot welcomes youth and is a year-round golf home for kids and adults, making it a family-friendly environment.
